# kUSBInformationDeviceIsInResetBit

**Enumeration Case**

The system is resetting the hub port that the USB attaches to.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsInResetBit = 6
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsInResetBit
